paper_analysis.summary: The paper reports soft-x-ray ARPES measurements on heavily Si-doped GaN and models how surface band bending modifies the k-resolved electronic structure using self-consistent Poisson-Schrödinger analysis.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper appears to present soft-x-ray ARPES measurements and self-consistent Poisson-Schrödinger modeling, but no associated dataset or source data files were identified from the available information.
